parameters.content:
## TikTok Trend Tracker to Telegram Bot Daily Digest — WayinVideo Summarization + GPT-4o-mini + Telegram + Sheets

For social media teams, content agencies, and brand managers who want to track what is trending on TikTok in their niche every morning without manually watching hours of videos. Every day at 8AM this workflow reads pending TikTok video URLs from your Google Sheet, checks if there are any to process, submits each to WayinVideo Summarization API, and stores per-video summaries. Once all videos are processed, a Code node aggregates all summaries into one combined string and GPT-4o-mini writes a clean daily digest — trend overview, per-video bullet points, top 3 content patterns, action recommendations, and trending tags. A Code node formats everything into a Telegram Markdown message with auto-truncation at 4000 characters. Telegram Bot sends the digest to your team channel. Google Sheets logs the digest and marks all processed videos.

## How it works
- **1. Schedule — Every Day 8AM** triggers the pipeline daily
- **2. Google Sheets — Read Pending Videos** reads all rows from the Video Queue tab
- **3. IF — Any Pending Videos Today?** stops the workflow cleanly if the queue is empty
- **4–6. WayinVideo Summarization** submits each URL, waits 60 seconds, polls until SUCCEEDED
- **7. IF — Summary Complete?** checks status — retries via 30-second wait if not ready
- **9. Code — Extract Summary Per Video** extracts summary, highlights array, and tags per video
- **10. Code — Aggregate All Summaries** collects all per-video items into one combined text string for GPT — this node sits above the main flow as it waits for all items
- **11. AI Agent — Write Daily Digest** uses GPT-4o-mini to write a 5-section digest with trend overview, video summaries, top patterns, action recommendations, and top tags
- **13. Code — Format Telegram Message** builds a Markdown-formatted Telegram message with section headers and auto-truncates at 4000 characters
- **14. Telegram — Send Daily Digest** sends the message to your team channel via Bot API
- **15. Google Sheets — Log Digest** appends the digest summary to the Digest Log tab
- **16. Google Sheets — Mark Videos Processed** updates each Video Queue row with Processed status

## Set up steps
1. In **4. WayinVideo — Submit Summarization** and **6. WayinVideo — Get Summary Results** — replace `YOUR_WAYINVIDEO_API_KEY`
2. In **12. OpenAI — GPT-4o-mini Model** — connect your OpenAI credential
3. In **2** and **15** and **16** — connect Google Sheets OAuth2 and replace `YOUR_TREND_SHEET_ID`
4. In **14. Telegram — Send Daily Digest** — replace `YOUR_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID` and connect your Telegram Bot credential (create bot via @BotFather, get chat ID via getUpdates)
5. Create a Google Sheet named TikTok Trend Tracker with two tabs: Video Queue (columns: Video URL, Video Title, Niche / Category, Date Added, Status, Processed Date) and Digest Log (columns: Digest Date, Niche, Videos Processed, Overview, Top Patterns, Action Recommendations, Top Tags, Telegram Sent, Sent On)

## Schedule Trigger
Fires every day at 8AM automatically. Can also be triggered manually to process today's queue on demand.

nodes.name: Section — Sheet Read and Empty Queue Check

parameters.content:
## Sheet Read and Empty Queue Check
Reads all rows from the Video Queue tab. IF no pending videos exist the workflow stops cleanly — no error. IF videos are found each one is processed sequentially.

nodes.name: Section — WayinVideo Summarization Submit and Poll

parameters.content:
## WayinVideo Summarization Submit and Poll
Submits each TikTok video URL to the Summarization API. Waits 60 seconds for initial processing. Polls the results endpoint until status equals SUCCEEDED.

nodes.name: Section — Summary Status Check and Retry Loop

parameters.content:
## Summary Status Check and Retry Loop
IF checks for SUCCEEDED status. TRUE proceeds to per-video extraction. FALSE waits 30 seconds and polls again. Loop continues until summary is ready.

nodes.name: Section — Per-Video Extract, Aggregate, and AI Digest Writing

parameters.content:
## Per-Video Extract, Aggregate, and AI Digest Writing
Code node extracts summary, highlights, and tags per video. The Aggregate node (10) sits above to collect ALL processed items into one combined string before passing to GPT. GPT-4o-mini writes a 5-section daily digest. Note: node 10 receives all items at once after the last video is processed.

nodes.name: Section — Telegram Format, Send, and Sheet Logs

parameters.content:
## Telegram Format, Send, and Sheet Logs
Builds a Markdown-formatted Telegram message with auto-truncation at 4000 chars. Telegram Bot sends the digest. Google Sheets logs the digest to the Digest Log tab and marks all Video Queue rows as Processed.

parameters.text:
=You are a social media trend analyst who writes sharp, actionable daily digests for marketing teams.

Your team tracks trending TikTok videos in their niche every day. Today's batch of videos has been summarized by AI. Your job is to compile all these summaries into one clean, scannable daily digest that the team can read in under 2 minutes on Telegram.

---

## TODAY'S TRENDING VIDEOS

{{ $json.allVideoSummaries }}

---

## DIGEST WRITING RULES
1. Write for a fast-moving social media team — bullet points and short sentences only
2. Start with a 1-2 sentence overview of today's overall trend patterns
3. Cover each video briefly — what it was about and why it is trending
4. Extract the top 3 content patterns or hooks being used across these videos
5. End with 2-3 specific action recommendations for the team
6. Total length: 300-400 words maximum — Telegram readers skim
7. Use emojis sparingly — only for section headers
8. No generic filler — every sentence must add value

---

## OUTPUT FORMAT
Return in this exact structure:

DIGEST_OVERVIEW:
[1-2 sentence overview of today's trends]

VIDEO_SUMMARIES:
[For each video — one bullet point: Video title/topic — what it covers — why it is trending]

TOP_PATTERNS:
[3 bullet points — content patterns or hooks being used today]

ACTION_RECOMMENDATIONS:
[2-3 bullet points — specific things the team should do or create today]

TOP_TAGS:
[Top 8 tags from today's videos — comma separated]

options.systemMessage: =You are an expert social media trend analyst. Date: {{ $now.toFormat('dd MMMM yyyy') }}. Niche being tracked: {{ $json.niche }}. Total videos today: {{ $json.totalVideos }}.
